name: Investex
description_short: InvesTex Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution serving the Lone Star College System region in Houston, Texas, offering savings accounts, loans, credit cards, and mortgages.
description_long:
InvesTex Credit Union is a not-for-profit, member-owned credit union based in Humble, Texas, with routing number 313082838. The institution operates two physical branch locations—Corporate/FM 1960 Office in Humble and Aldine Office in Houston—and serves individuals living or working within the geographic region of the Lone Star College System.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including deposit accounts (savings accounts, money market accounts, checking accounts, club accounts, certificates of deposit, and IRAs), consumer loans (signature/personal loans, auto loans, home equity loans, and mortgages), credit cards with Visa branding, student loans, and share/CD-secured loans. Members can access services through multiple channels: physical branch locations, online banking, eBranch representatives available during business hours, and a mobile app available on both iOS and Android platforms.

InvesTex distinguishes itself through competitive rates and personalized service. The website emphasizes a "People First" philosophy with taglines like "We are here when you need us" and "Trust and service combined with personalized technology." The credit union promotes features including overdraft protection, rewards programs, online calculators, and fraud security resources. Current promotional rates advertised include CD rates as high as 4.07% APY and signature loans with rates as low as 0% (specific floor rate not displayed on homepage).

As a credit union, InvesTex is regulated by the NCUA and operates on a not-for-profit basis, meaning profits are returned to members through better rates and lower fees. The field of membership restriction to the Lone Star College System geographic region is a significant limitation. Like most credit unions, membership eligibility is limited and not universally available, and the institution maintains relatively modest branch presence compared to major banks.
pros: Membership-based structure returns profits to members as better rates and lower fees
Competitive CD rates advertised as high as 4.07% APY
Multiple access channels: 2 physical branches, online banking, eBranch, and mobile app
NCUA-insured deposits provide federal insurance on member accounts
Diverse loan products including auto, personal, home equity, mortgages, and student loans
24/7 online and mobile application capability despite limited business hours for phone support
Skip-a-Payment promotion available for qualifying loans
cons: Membership restricted to those living or working in Lone Star College System geographic area, severely limiting eligibility
Only 2 physical branch locations in Houston area, limiting convenience for members outside immediate region
Specific loan rate floors not fully transparent on homepage (displays 0% as placeholder)
Limited information about fee structure beyond mention of a Fee Schedule link
Vulnerability to fraud alerts and ongoing phishing/scam attempts targeting members
best_for: Employees and students of Lone Star College System seeking membership-based banking benefits
Houston-area residents eligible for membership who prioritize competitive CD and savings rates
Borrowers in the service area seeking personal, auto, or home equity loans from a credit union
Members seeking 24/7 remote banking through eBranch and mobile app with local branch backup
diagnosis: InvesTex Credit Union is best for eligible residents and employees within the Lone Star College System service area in the Houston metropolitan area seeking competitive rates and personalized service from a not-for-profit financial institution. The primary caveat is strict membership eligibility limited to the geographic region, making this institution inaccessible to most consumers outside the defined service territory.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Investex — Credit Union in Humble, TX | CreditDoc
meta_description: Investex — NCUA-insured credit union in Humble, TX. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
